headlines.headline: Relvos Biosciences reports unexpected decline in Central Europe revenue

sentiment.reasoning: An unexpected decline in a specific regional revenue stream indicates a negative operational trend that will likely weigh on investor sentiment.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
